_comment: LKHS configuration template. Copy this to ONE of two places: (a) the global ~/.claude/lkhs-capture-config.json (applies to every vault on this machine), or (b) a repo-local .claude/lkhs.config.json inside the vault (ships with a clone, overlays the global). Resolution everywhere is env > config > built-in default; see .claude/bin/config.ts. Remove the _comment_* keys in your real config or leave them, they are ignored.
_comment_vault: centralVault: absolute path to the vault (where all memory is written). Optional. If omitted, the engine derives the root from the bin/ script location, so you usually only set this when running scripts from outside the vault. Env override: LKHS_VAULT_ROOT.
_comment_identity: personaHub: the graph hub / identity owner. Optional. If omitted it is derived from persona/entities.json (sticky across rebuilds) then core_profile.json user block. Set it to pin identity. Env override: LKHS_PERSONA_LABEL / LKHS_PERSONA_ID.
_comment_models: summaryModel: model for all background summaries/cards/themes (env LKHS_SUMMARY_MODEL). chatModel: model for the web-console memory chat (env LKHS_CHAT_MODEL); falls back to summaryModel.
_comment_ports: daemonPort: warm retrieval daemon (env LKHS_DAEMON_PORT). webPort: local console (env LKHS_WEB_PORT).
_comment_retrieval: Retrieval + rerank gate knobs. retrieveThreshold is the cosine fallback floor; rerankHigh/rerankLow bound the cross-encoder inject/skip bands; personaBoost is the additive bump for the identity layer; metaFloor gates overview queries in the web console.
_comment_precision: Live-gate precision levers (tuned on a measured felt-quality pass; these defaults cut over-injection 40%->10% with recall unchanged). gateItemFloor: per-item keep floor; boostFloor: persona/fact boost only applies above this RAW rerank score; entityMidFloor: mid-band entity-name injects need this top score.
_comment_scopes: Audience scopes + profiles. Every profile has a ceiling on the privacy ladder clinical < private < personal < professional < public; retrieval under a profile only surfaces items at-or-above the ceiling. 'full' = everything except the clinical quarantine (the default; matches classic behavior). pin_cwds: project folder NAMES that auto-select the profile for sessions in those folders.
_comment_chunkScopes: Chunk scope overrides: layer defaults can be replaced per layer, and path prefixes (vault-relative, forward slashes) force a scope for specific files/subtrees (e.g. personal letters inside a professional-default layer).
_comment_etiquette: etiquettePersonalProjects: project folder names whose sessions are PERSONAL: their journals/cards scope private, work sessions keep them out of topical injections, and date-triggered reminders defer.
_comment_hygiene: driftAlarm: the weekly store-hygiene pass alarms in TODAY.md when the offline eval composite drops by more than this between runs.
_comment_voice: mimesisProfilesRoot: OPTIONAL absolute path to a Mimesis-style voice system's profiles/ dir. When set, the nightly preference miner writes mined accepts/edit-pairs there and weekly recalibration runs. Omit to run the memory system without the voice loop.
_comment_capture: exclude: absolute paths whose Claude Code sessions are NOT captured into memory (matched case-insensitively, OS-agnostic).
_comment_ingest: ingestRoots: directories whose immediate subfolders are ingested as projects into library/. ingestExclude: folder names skipped during the file walk. ingestSkipPatterns: case-insensitive substrings marking copy/backup folders to skip.
_comment_clinical: clinical: OPTIONAL override of the clinical-quarantine lexicon used by the persona pipeline (persona-facts.ts). Each key is a list of terms OR-joined into a case-insensitive word-boundary regex. If omitted entirely, safe built-in defaults apply. med: medication/treatment terms (a generic '<number>mg' pattern is always appended). crisis: personal psychiatric-crisis terms. coping: maladaptive-coping terms. advocacyGuard / academicGuard: terms that mark advocacy work or coursework so they are NOT mis-quarantined as personal clinical material.
_comment_buildDate: buildDate: OPTIONAL frozen date (YYYY-MM-DD) for reproducible persona rebuilds. Omit to stamp facts with the day the rebuild runs (recommended). Env override: LKHS_BUILD_DATE.
